mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${tableName} ( id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, station VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, date DATE NOT NULL, datetime DATETIME NOT NULL, time TIME NOT NULL, temperature FLOAT NULL, humidity FLOAT NULL, speed FLOAT NULL, direction FLOAT NULL, rain FLOAT NULL, sunlight FLOAT NULL, pm25 FLOAT NULL, pm10 FLOAT NULL, UNIQUE KEY (datetime), INDEX (date), INDEX (station) )
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ${tableName} ( station, date, datetime, time, temperature, humidity, speed, direction, rain, sunlight, pm25, pm10 ) VALUES
( #{meteoData.station}, #{meteoData.date}, #{meteoData.datetime}, #{meteoData.time}, #{meteoData.temperature}, #{meteoData.humidity}, #{meteoData.speed}, #{meteoData.direction}, #{meteoData.rain}, #{meteoData.sunlight}, #{meteoData.pm25}, #{meteoData.pm10} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE temperature = VALUES(temperature), humidity = VALUES(humidity), speed = VALUES(speed), direction = VALUES(direction), rain = VALUES(rain), sunlight = VALUES(sunlight), pm25 = VALUES(pm25), pm10 = VALUES(pm10)
